plugins.name: agent-cowork
plugins.description: Toolkit for agent cooperation covering two areas: (1) team public rules (AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md) lifecycle — draft-public-rules (draft generation from project analysis), refine-boundaries (error-driven Boundaries accumulation), audit-public-rules (anti-pattern diagnosis and consent-based improvement); (2) multi-repo shared documentation via git submodule — shared-docs (init, sync, write/PR, doctor; GitHub Flow with GitHub and GitLab support).

plugins.name: misc
plugins.description: Miscellaneous personal skills: pdf-parser, claude-hook-notify-setup, docs-to-md (fetch tech docs as local Markdown), fsd-docs (Feature-Sliced Design v2.1 knowledge pack), handoff (generate agent-to-agent brief from current conversation).
